channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → nan : Impose administrative sanctions, not specified below (Turkey)
item.description: GDELT Event: Impose administrative sanctions, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIA / nan. Location: Turkey. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] SWEDEN → CAPTAIN : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Kremlin, Moskva, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: SWEDEN / CAPTAIN. Location: Kremlin, Moskva, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] HAMAS → ISRAEL : Violate ceasefire (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Violate ceasefire. Actors: HAMAS / ISRAEL. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 5 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → LEBANON : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAELI / LEBANON. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.
